titleEn: EuroTier and EnergyDecentral return to Hanover in 2026
summaryZh: EuroTier 2026（国际畜牧业贸易展）与EnergyDecentral将于2026年11月10-13日在德国汉诺威同期举办，预计展览面积22万平方米，吸引来自50多个国家的2100多家参展商。展会聚焦效率、可持续性和动物福利，涵盖奶牛、肉牛、猪、家禽、羊、马等品类，并新增EuroTier Milky Way（奶牛技术专区）、DLG-VetCon（大型动物兽医网络培训活动）等新板块。展会主题为“畜牧智能”，通过DLG Spotlight展示自动挤奶机器人、饲料生产智能技术等创新。门票已开售。
featuredReason: EuroTier是全球畜牧业技术风向标，2026年新增的机器人、智能饲料生产等专题展区直接关联智慧畜牧核心应用，是了解国际前沿技术趋势和行业动态的绝佳窗口。
contentFull: Industry and legislation Conferences & Events EuroTier and EnergyDecentral return to Hanover in 2026 Trade fairs to run 10–13 November with focus on livestock systems 28 April 2026 4 minute read By: Global Ag Media Europe EuroTier 2026, a major international trade fair for livestock production, will take place alongside EnergyDecentral from 10 to 13 November 2026 in Hanover, Germany. The ticket shop is now open.The combined events will cover around 220,000 square metres and are expected to host more than 2,100 exhibitors and organisations from over 50 countries. Exhibitors will present technologies and systems for livestock farming, with a focus on efficiency, sustainability and animal welfare across dairy and beef cattle, pigs, poultry, sheep, goats and horses.The programme also includes the Inhouse Farming – Feed & Food Show, which highlights developments in areas such as aquaculture and alternative proteins.Organisers say the 2026 edition will include several new formats, including the EuroTier Milky Way, where dairy-related technologies will be presented across multiple halls. Other additions include DLG-VetCon, a new networking and training event for veterinarians working with large animals, and the Innovation Boulevard, showcasing selected entries from the EuroTier and EnergyDecentral innovation awards.Ticket sales for EuroTier 2026 are now open. One-day tickets cost €33 online or €42 at the gate. A four-day pass is priced at €78 online or €99 on site. Tickets are valid for entry from 10 to 13 November.DLG Spotlights – live demonstrations and special exhibitsUnder the guiding theme “Intelligence in animal farming”, exhibitors will demonstrate how innovative approaches and strategies can further improve efficiency, sustainability and animal welfare, both at their stands and within the DLG Spotlights: Spotlight TopTierTreff (Hall 11):The central meeting place for national and international breeders. Leading breeding companies and organizations present current breeding strategies with a space dedicated to dialogue, knowledge transfer and innovation in dairy and beef cattle breeding. Animals will remain at the exhibitors’ stands and be shown via video on a panoramic screen instead of being led onto a stage as previously.Spotlight Forage Production (Hall 12):As part of a curated special exhibition, exhibitors show what smart farming means in forage production and how feed quality can be positively influenced from cutting through to silage. The program is complemented by the new Forage Days on 12 and 13 November. As part of the DLG Spotlight “Forage Production”, the DLG Expert Stage Cattle will focus specifically on needs‑based ruminant feeding. Spotlight Barn Robot Event (Hall 13):This year, registered milking technology manufacturers will present the latest robotic solutions for automated milking. The focus will be on conversion solutions from conventional parlors to robots, new building concepts and milking in large herds. Spotlight Emission Reduction in Pig and Poultry Farming (Hall 17):How can animal husbandry and environmental protection be reconciled? Participating exhibitors will showcase innovative processes and technologies for reducing emissions from pig and poultry farming. Experts will present solutions that relieve environmental pressure, promote animal health and maintain farm profitability.Spotlight Innovation Boulevard (Hall 21):For the first time, exhibitors will have the opportunity to present innovations in the EuroTier and EnergyDecentral Award scheme to visitors in a central location.Spotlight “DLG Solar Initiative + On‑farm Energy” (EnergyDecentral, Hall 25):This spotlight demonstrates how agricultural businesses can become key pillars of regional energy supply through agrivoltaics, battery storage and biogas. The focus is on integration into existing infrastructure and identifying new business opportunities and greater energy self‑sufficiency.Spotlight Inhouse Farming: Circular Economy (Hall 24):A central theme is the production of alternative proteins with a focus on agricultural circularity. Through selected exhibits and targeted information, the spotlight offers compact, in‑depth insights into technologies and concepts for new protein production systems.Expert Stages – topic‑focused hubsEuroTier 2026 will once again feature several Expert Stages:DLG Expert Stage Cattle (Hall 12) – breeding, feeding strategies, animal health, climate protection, sustainability, market and marketing perspectivesDLG Expert Stage Pig (Hall 17) – linking animal welfare, feeding and emission reduction with profitability and social acceptanceDLG Expert Stage Poultry (Hall 17) – production systems, animal welfare, hygiene, nutrition, emissions and market developmentsDLG Expert Stage Barn Robot Event (Hall 13) – presentations and technical contributions complementing the Barn Robot EventDLG Expert Stage “Intelligence in animal farming” (DLG stand, Hall 13) – ideas that make intelligent farming a realityDLG Studio Stage (DLG stand, Hall 13) – compact, interactive formats on key agricultural topics and personal developmentDLG Expert Stage EnergyDecentral (Hall 25) – daily discussions on biogas, photovoltaics, energy storage, wood energy, combined heat and power and carbon farmingDLG Expert Stage Inhouse Farming (Hall 24) – the future of alternative proteins, indoor production and sustainable agri‑systemsDLG Expert Stage Biosecurity / Feed Safety (Hall 21) – hygiene concepts, feed quality and new management and prevention technologies.Networking & eventsEuroTier serves as a platform for flagship events in the international livestock sector, bringing farmers, agri‑business representatives and experts together for networking and professional exchange. In cooperation with partner organizations, numerous conferences and evening events are planned, including the International Cattle & Pig Event, the International Poultry Conference, the International Poultry Event, DLG‑VetCon 2026, the Young Professionals Day and the International Farmers Day.The program is complemented by the Science Campus, agri‑food start‑ups and the Female Agri Fellows Networking Event.Award‑winning innovations – inspiring peopleAs the world’s leading trade fair for livestock professionals, EuroTier is the international platform for pioneering innovations and concepts. The DLG presents leading international awards:Two awards: Innovation Award EuroTier and EnergyDecentrail – recognizing practical livestock technology and renewable energy innovationsAnimal Welfare Award – honouring products and services that significantly improve animal welfare and healthWomen in Ag Award – recognizing inspiring women from agriculture, agribusiness, education, research and developmentDLG Agri Influencer Award – awarded to outstanding YouTubers, TikTokers and Facebook and Instagram creators Our Partners PIC dsm-firmenich Lanxess Hamlet Protein Global Ag Media More from this author More News View all Russian strikes cut Ukraine grain export capacity by a third Market Trends Feed markets 17 July 2026 2 minute read Soybean futures slip on milder weather outlook - CBOT Market Trends Feed markets 17 July 2026 1 minute read New-crop export sales top expectations despite pressure Hog futures mixed as pork cutout price climbs - CME 17 July 2026 1 minute read Cattle futures hit four-month low as cash prices slide Our Partners PIC dsm-firmenich Lanxess Hamlet Protein
translationZh:
EuroTier 2026，这一国际畜牧业大型贸易展，将与EnergyDecentral同期于2026年11月10日至13日在德国汉诺威举办。票务现已开售。

联合展会将覆盖约22万平方米，预计将迎来来自50多个国家的2100多家参展商和组织。参展商将展示畜牧养殖技术与系统，重点关注奶牛、肉牛、猪、家禽、绵羊、山羊和马等品类的效率、可持续性和动物福利。

展会项目还包括“Inhouse Farming – Feed & Food Show”，该展区聚焦水产养殖和替代蛋白等领域的发展。

主办方表示，2026届展会将包含多个新形式，包括EuroTier Milky Way，该专区将在多个展馆集中展示奶牛相关技术。其他新增内容有DLG-VetCon，这是一个面向大型动物兽医的新型网络交流与培训活动，以及Innovation Boulevard，该展区将展示从EuroTier和EnergyDecentral创新奖中选出的入围项目。

EuroTier 2026门票现已开售。单日票在线购买价格为33欧元，现场购票为42欧元。四日通票在线价格为78欧元，现场为99欧元。门票有效期为11月10日至13日。

**DLG Spotlight——现场演示与特别展览**

在“畜牧智能”的指导主题下，参展商将在其展位及DLG Spotlight活动中展示创新方法及策略如何进一步提升效率、可持续性和动物福利：

**Spotlight TopTierTreff（11号馆）：**
国内外育种者的核心聚会场所。领先的育种公司和组织将展示当前的育种策略，并设有专门区域用于奶牛和肉牛育种领域的对话、知识传播与创新。动物将留在参展商展位，通过全景屏幕以视频形式展示，而不再像以往那样被牵上舞台。

**Spotlight 饲料生产（12号馆）：**
作为策划的特别展览的一部分，参展商将展示智能农业在饲料生产中的含义，以及如何从收割到青贮过程中积极影响饲料质量。该活动辅以11月12日和13日的新“饲料日”。作为DLG Spotlight“饲料生产”的一部分，DLG专家讲坛（牛业）将特别关注基于需求的瘤胃动物饲喂。

**Spotlight 牛舍机器人活动（13号馆）：**
今年，注册的挤奶技术制造商将展示用于自动化挤奶的最新机器人解决方案。重点将放在从传统挤奶厅到机器人的改造方案、新牛舍概念以及大型牛群的挤奶。

**Spotlight 排放（……）**
contentHtml:
EuroTier and EnergyDecentral return to Hanover in 2026 
Trade fairs to run 10–13 November with focus on livestock systems
